title: Ukraine s new AI-guided laser burns holes in Shahed suicide drones in seconds from 3.1 miles away also useful for demining operations, trailer-mounted Tryzub system is in final stages of testing
summary: Ukraine has developed a mobile AI-powered laser system to down Shahed drones at 3.1 miles away.
insight: Ukraine gains significant drone defense advantage with AI-guided laser technology.

title: FCC reverses course, allows software updates for foreign-made drones and routers until 2029 agency says blocking security patches could create cybersecurity risks
summary: The FCC extends waivers for foreign-made drones and routers to receive updates until 2029, prioritizing cybersecurity and consumer protection.
insight: Preventing security patch blocks protects consumers from potential cyber threats.

title: Maryland citizens slapped with $2 billion power grid upgrade bill for out-of-state AI data centers state complains to federal energy regulators, says additional cost breaks ratepayer protection pledge promises
summary: Maryland complains to federal regulators about a $2 billion power grid upgrade bill, citing that most data centers benefiting from the upgrades are located out-of-state, particularly in neighboring regions.
insight: Ratepayers face additional costs for out-of-state data center benefits

title: Cloudflare cuts 20% of its jobs due to AI, and its stock takes a 19% spill 1,100 jobs disappearing as company increased usage of AI sixfold over past months
summary: Cloudflare is cutting 20% of its jobs due to AI adoption, resulting in a 1,100-job reduction and a 19% stock price drop.
insight: Rapid AI integration may lead to significant job displacement and market volatility.

title: Save $290 on this Ryzen 7 9800X3D, 32GB DDR5, Samsung 9100 Pro 1TB combo from Newegg $949.99 bundle includes free 750W power supply and one-year VPN subscription
summary: Newegg's AM5 combo bundle includes the Ryzen 7 9800X3D, 32GB DDR5 memory, and a Samsung 9100 Pro 1TB SSD, along with a free 750W power supply and a one-year NordVPN subscription for $949.99.
insight: Powerful gaming PC bundle at an attractive price point combined with extras.

title: Nextorage NEM-PAC 2TB SSD Review: A solid, PS5-ready workhorse
summary: The Nextorage NEM-PAC 2TB SSD offers good performance and a PS5-ready heatsink.
insight: PS5-compliance makes it a reliable storage option for gamers and PS5 users.

title: Best budget gaming laptops of 2026: The best cheap laptops we've tested and benchmarked
summary: Gaming laptops are expensive, and only getting pricier as AI-driven shortages increase. Here are the best options for budget gaming laptops on the cheap, comprised of laptop models that we have tested throughout our full, stringent gaming test suite that measures performance in demanding graphical conditions.

title: Fears grow that age verification coming to VPNs as a British research firm labels them a 'loophole' one app developer saw downloads surge by 1,800% in just the first month after the UK's Online Safety Act took effect
summary: VPN downloads surged after the UK's Online Safety Act took effect, sparking fears of age verification requirements on VPNs. The research firm views VPNs as a 'loophole' for avoiding online regulations. This has implications for users' online freedoms and anonymity.
insight: Age verification may restrict users' online freedom and anonymity.

title: Testing Nvidia's RTX Mega Geometry tech VRAM-reducing tech a leap forward for path-traced rendering
summary: Nvidia's RTX Mega Geometry technology reduces VRAM consumption and eliminates visual artifacts, enabling photorealistic real-time graphics. We tested this tech in Alan Wake 2 and the RTX Bonsai Diorama Demo to evaluate its effectiveness. The results show potential for improved path-traced rendering.
insight: Faster rendering with reduced VRAM usage unlocks photorealistic gaming possibilities.

title: Commodore Amiga-emulating TheA1200 retro computer delayed nearly half a year by global chip shortages Retro Games Ltd says it will use the extra time to finesse the software
summary: The Commodore Amiga-emulating TheA1200 retro computer has been delayed nearly half a year due to global chip shortages. It is now scheduled for release on December 4. Retro Games Ltd plans to use this extra time to refine the software.
insight: Global chip shortages impact retro gaming console releases significantly.

title: Supermicro-tied execs used Thailand government entity to ship Nvidia AI GPUs to China report alleges Chinese web giant Alibaba received restricted servers
summary: A network allegedly smuggled restricted Nvidia AI hardware to China, including Alibaba, via Thailand. Supermicro execs were reportedly involved in the operation. This has raised concerns about the misuse of AI technology.
insight: Smuggling of AI tech raises concerns about national security and control.

title: Linux mascot Tux the penguin hits 30 years old Linus Torvalds outlined the design of the 'slightly overweight penguin' on May 9, 1996
summary: Linux mascot Tux the penguin was first conceptualized by Linus Torvalds on May 9, 1996. This iconic character has since become synonymous with Linux, symbolizing the operating system's unique identity and appeal. Tux's enduring popularity testifies to the lasting impact of its original design.
insight: Tux solidifies Linux's distinct brand identity in the tech world.

title: My experience upgrading the BIOS of a Windows 11 mini PC (with BitLocker) in 2026
summary: Upgrading the BIOS of a Windows 11 mini PC with BitLocker can result in a frustrating experience due to the requirement of entering a recovery key after reboot, adding unnecessary steps to an otherwise straightforward process.
insight: BIOS upgrades may trigger BitLocker recovery key requirements unexpectedly.

title: Intel roadmap leak reveals Nova Lake, Razor Lake, Titan Lake, and Moon Lake through 2028 with Nvidia RTX GPU tile integration
summary: Intel's processor roadmap includes Nova Lake, Razor Lake, and more through 2028. These new processors will address areas where Intel has fallen behind AMD. The lineups are expected to include Nvidia RTX GPU tile integration.
insight: Intel aims to regain ground against AMD with updated processor lineups

title: Google's Fitbit Air is a Whoop-like screen-less fitness tracker built around AI
summary: The Fitbit Air is a screen-less fitness tracker with passive tracking capabilities. It's designed for ease of wear and focuses on tracking user data. The device is a compact module that fits into various bands.
insight: Simplistic design prioritizes user data over interactive features

title: Your Yarbo lawnmower is a backdoor into your Wi-Fi network
summary: A security vulnerability in Yarbo lawnmowers exposes users' private information due to a preinstalled backdoor. The issue affects thousands of units sold across 30+ countries. The vulnerability cannot be disabled.
insight: Preinstalled backdoor compromises users' private information without consent.
